findings.message:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1880-1951) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1933)
findings.name: incorrect-exp

findings.message:
Math.invMod(uint256,uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1991-2037) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- quotient = gcd / remainder (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#2013)
	- (gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#2015-2022)
findings.name: divide-before-multiply

findings.message:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1880-1951) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1918)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#1939)
findings.name: divide-before-multiply

		ERC20Votes._update(address,address,uint256)

findings.message:
Math.log2(uint256) (../sb/VotacaoCondominio_F.sol#2288-2327) uses literals with too many digits:
